opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online booking capability.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours call competitors who offer instant booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI scheduling chatbot on site to capture and confirm plumbing jobs 24/7.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact means zero digital lead tracking.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from Boise area leads vanishes with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Integrate AI call recording with auto-CRM entry to log every Idaho Master Plumbing inquiry.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow-Up
opportunities.signal: 121 reviews at 4.7 stars but no review-request patterns or loyalty signals detected on site.
opportunities.observation: Strong reputation exists but is growing passively, leaving referrals and repeat bookings on the table.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS sequence requesting reviews and offering seasonal plumbing maintenance reminders.
